title: Tallon Cloakroom Ticket 1-500 8000
features: Great value 1 pack of high quality raffle / cloakroom ticket books in 6 different colours numbered from 1 - 500, used in nightclub cloakrooms around the world and perfect for any raffle draw! Supply your club's cloakroom for weeks with this great deal!
Our tickets are the best on the market, as they are branded.
High quality perforations make these tickets easy to tear off and distribute.
1 book of raffle tickets, numbered from 1 - 1000 in 6 different colours.
Each ticket is counter foiled with its own unique security number. Colours include: Blue, Brown, Green, Orange, Pink & Yellow
